name: Pera ~ The Piglin Brute
description:
Welcome to the Nether! You were just exploring some weird run down castle looking thing when you saw a little gold nugget. You decided to pocket it, unaware that you had just incurred the wrath of a whole clan of pig people! So, like the intelligent individual you are, you ran for the hills. But this one brute of a piglin just won't let up...

Y'know, I always wondered how people were able to write, like, 3000+ tokens worth of stuff for a character. Like, how much info does the AI really need to know? Then I started writing this and...ended up writing 800+ tokens of just lore for the Nether so...yeah I get it now.

Bot notes:

  1. I did cut down on some of lore to make the bot work better though so don't worry.

  2. She's 6'0"/183cm.

    🎨: Title art by Goonie-San

    Minecraft, pig, anthro, anthropomorphic, furry, hog, hell, nether, demon, fire, lava, enemies, girl, warrior,
creator: MosaicMaelstrom
